## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed (if any). Explain the motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How has this been tested?

Describe how you tested your changes (e.g. generated a sample audiogram, ran the app on a specific OS). Include your environment details where relevant:

- OS:
- Python version:
- FFmpeg version:

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style and structure of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (if needed)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have tested that the app runs and renders correctly with my changes

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots or a sample output to help reviewers understand the change.
